title: Evees Teamfortress Craft v.0.1
description: Replace the Mace & Wind Charge with TF2 Items to get the true Team Fortress 2 experience in Minecraft! (Sounds included)
body:
![Evees TFC Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1180e536271b0e7bd4da09d2c8481be3c359d04e.png)
# Release Trailer
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Gt2Tdikqgbs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# About the pack

### **This pack replaces a handful of items inspired by Teamfortress 2 to enhance your gameplay experience.**

To switch between the models provided, follow the instruction inside the README file of the pack!
